base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hyper_bomb_explosion — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1987 mega man. Hyper Bomb detonation VFX — 6-frame expanding spiral on 911×200 strip. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
